title: Django Unchained
desc: When Django, a slave, is freed, he joins forces with a bounty hunter to rescue his wife.

title: Silver Linings Playbook
desc: After spending eight months in a mental institution, a man tries to start a new life.

title: Erin Brockovich
desc: Erin Brockovich builds a case against a power company that pollutes a town's water supply.

desc: A female assassin wakes up from a coma to find and kill her former boss for attacking her.

desc: Robert Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks to protect the world from an evil plan.

title: Poseidon
desc: A giant wave crashes into Poseidon, a luxurious cruise liner, flipping it upside down.

title: The Da Vinci Code
desc: A dying curator of the Louvre hides cryptic clues on Da Vinci paintings. Now it is up to Robert Langdon and Sophie Neveu to follow the clues and unearth a secret kept hidden for centuries.

title: The Da Vinci Code
desc: Langdon and Sophie follow clues hidden on Da Vinci paintings to expose a well-kept secret.

title: Gangs of New York
desc: After his father is murdered in a gang fight, a man sets out to seek retribution.

title: The Aviator
desc: Howard Hughes designs planes and makes films while battling mental illness.

title: The Pursuit of Happyness
desc: Chris has to deal with the financial crisis and his son's custody after his wife leaves.

title: Speed Kills
desc: A wealthy speedboat racer's secret life lands him in trouble with law enforcement and drug lords.

title: Fallen
desc: Homicide detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of serial killer Edgar Reese. Soon after the execution, the killings start again, and they are very similar to Reese's style.

title: To Be Announced
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
desc: Charlie, with the help of two high school seniors, learns how to deal with his struggles.

title: The Big Short
desc: A few shrewd but oddball fund managers and traders bet against the US mortgage system's stability.

title: The Big Short
desc: In 2006-2007 a group of investors bet against the US mortgage market. In their research they discover how flawed and corrupt the market is.

title: Stepmom
desc: A fashion photographer tries to get close to her boyfriend's children and ex-wife.

title: Stepmom
desc: A terminally-ill woman must deal with her ex-husband's new lover, who will be their children's stepmother.

title: Knives Out
desc: When a renowned novelist passes unexpectedly, a detective uncovers family secrets.

title: Knives Out
desc: A detective investigates the death of the patriarch of an eccentric, combative family.

title: Charlie Countryman
desc: Charlie's mum's spirit sends him to Bucharest, where he fulfils a promise to a passenger.

title: Charlie Countryman
desc: While travelling abroad, a guy falls for a Romanian beauty whose unreachable heart has its origins in her violent, charismatic ex.

title: Angels & Demons
desc: Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon works with a nuclear physicist to solve a murder and prevent a terrorist act against the Vatican during one of the significant events within the church.

title: Angels & Demons
desc: Robert Langdon, a symbologist, tries to stop a secret society from attacking the Vatican.

title: The Social Network
desc: Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as FB, he's sued by the twins who claimed he stole their idea and by the co-founder who was later squeezed out of the business.

title: The Social Network
desc: When Mark Zuckerberg creates Facebook, along with popularity, he also faces legal trouble.

title: Forrest Gump
desc: Forrest recounts early years of his life and longs to be reunited with his childhood love.

title: The Great Gatsby
desc: Nick gets interested in the exuberant life of Jay Gatsby, a mysterious millionaire.

title: The Great Gatsby
desc: A Midwestern war veteran finds himself drawn to the past and lifestyle of his millionaire neighbor.

title: Frozen Ground
desc: An Alaska State Trooper partners with a young woman who escaped the clutches of serial killer Robert Hansen to bring the murderer to justice. Based on actual events.

desc: The host engages in a candid conversation with celebrity guests who share intimate details about their personal and professional lives.

title: The November Man
desc: An ex-C.I.A. operative is tasked with a personal mission, facing off against his former pupil in a deadly game involving high-level C.I.A. officials and the Russian President-elect.

title: The Woman In Gold
desc: Elderly Maria battles Austria to reclaim her family's stolen artwork. It's personal!

title: Revolutionary Road
